name_en: $n = Get-Clipboard; $j = [ + (($n | ? { $_.Trim() -ne  } | % {  { `name_en`: `$($_.Trim().Replace('', ''))`, `name_jp`: `$($_.Trim().Replace('', ''))`, `status`: `Safe`, `category`: `NAPOS` } }) -join ,) + ]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($(Get-Location)/drugs.json, $j, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false))); git add drugs.json; git commit -m Final push; git push -f origin main; 【完了】サイトを見てください！
name_jp: $n = Get-Clipboard; $j = [ + (($n | ? { $_.Trim() -ne  } | % {  { `name_en`: `$($_.Trim().Replace('', ''))`, `name_jp`: `$($_.Trim().Replace('', ''))`, `status`: `Safe`, `category`: `NAPOS` } }) -join ,) + ]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($(Get-Location)/drugs.json, $j, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false))); git add drugs.json; git commit -m Final push; git push -f origin main; 【完了】サイトを見てください！
